identifier.description: Raw identifier: ANI/phone (E.164 or national), email, or account number. Normalized server-side, so an unencoded '+' is tolerated.

found.description: False when the identifier resolves to no subscriber.

party_id.description: Internal subscriber id. Pass to other tools; never read it aloud.

display_name.description: The subscriber's full name, for greeting them.

tenant_slug.description: The brand this subscriber belongs to, e.g. northwind.

tier.description: Account tier: bronze, silver or gold. Higher tiers may warrant more latitude.

verified.description: Always false here. Identity is NOT yet confirmed — call verify-customer with a PIN before doing anything account-specific.

last_channel.description: The channel this subscriber last contacted us on, e.g. webmessaging, sms, voice.

id_type_resolved.description: What the identifier matched: phone, email, account_no, msisdn, or unrecognized when it could not be parsed.
